title: Buttery Canadian Pancakes
description: A delicious breakfast recipe with a hint of Canadian flavor.
instructions: Preheat your griddle to medium heat (around 375°F).
In a large bowl, whisk together the Canadian Pancake Mix and melted butter.
Next, add in the water and egg, and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve warm with maple syrup and enjoy!
